build.buildCommand: npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm run predeploy && npm run build --workspace artifacts/api-server && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=artifacts/api-server/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=artifacts/api-server/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace artifacts/nextrade && npm run build --workspace artifacts/admin-portal
